description.initial: The trees thin here, giving way to rocky formations and uneven ground. A sharp, stony smell mixes with the earthy smell of the forest. The mountains are closer than they look.
description.return: Where the forest meets the approach to the mountains. Trees give way to rock and stone.
description.atmospheric: The air here carries two scents, the earthy smell of the forest and a sharp, stony smell from the mountains.

north.blockedMessage: The terrain rises sharply into impassable ridges of stone. There is no way through.

south.blockedMessage: The rocky slopes here lead nowhere useful. The cave entrance is further west.

interactables.name: Mountain View
interactables.examineText: Through a gap in the trees, you can see mountains rising in the distance. Their peaks seem to glitter with an unusual light.
